evals.prompt: Create a service account called data-exporter. It does not need access keys.
evals.expected_output: Creates iam/service-accounts/data-exporter/ with main.tf using _base-module pattern. Adds module to iam/main.tf. Runs terraform plan. Handoff.
expectations: Creates main.tf using the _base-module source pattern
Creates outputs.tf with user_name and user_arn
Does NOT create access keys or Secrets Manager resources

evals.prompt: Create a service account called etl-pipeline that needs programmatic access keys.
evals.expected_output: Creates full pattern with aws_iam_user, aws_iam_access_key, aws_secretsmanager_secret. Module block passes environment and region. Handoff.
expectations: Creates main.tf with aws_iam_user, aws_iam_access_key, aws_secretsmanager_secret, aws_secretsmanager_secret_version
Creates variables.tf with environment and region variables
Creates outputs.tf with user_name, user_arn, secret_arn
Adds module to iam/main.tf passing environment and region
